gpt-5.5.name: GPT-5.5: Flagship
gpt-5.5.description: OpenAI's flagship model for complex professional and agentic work, with configurable reasoning effort and a ~1M context window

gpt-5.5-pro.description: High-compute variant of GPT-5.5 for the most demanding reasoning tasks

gpt-5.4-nano.description: Cheapest GPT-5.x tier for high-throughput, simple tasks

gpt-5.2.description: Previous-generation coding/agentic flagship (superseded by GPT-5.4/5.5; still callable)
